title: Senior Radiologist at Rajiv Gandhi Cancer Institute Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Senior Radiologist at Rajiv Gandhi Cancer Institute Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Radiologist looking for your next big career move? Rajiv Gandhi Cancer Institute Holdings Services in Amritsar offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Rajiv Gandhi Cancer Institute Holdings Services:
Rajiv Gandhi Cancer Institute Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Wound Care

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rajiv Gandhi Cancer Institute Holdings Services!
